title: THE BLACKWOOD KAKO
incidentReport: Officers arrived shortly after sunset to find the victim inside the library. Four individuals remained at the estate, each offering a different account of the evening's events. Their testimonies, together with the collected evidence, should be enough to identify the culprit.

interviews.speaker: Alice
interviews.statement: I spent most of the evening reading. I never entered the library.

interviews.speaker: Bob
interviews.statement: Charlie looked nervous after dinner, but I don't know why.

interviews.speaker: Diana
interviews.statement: The kitchen was empty when I walked through it.

clues: Alice was not in the Library.
The Rope was brought to the Kitchen.
Charlie did not carry the Pistol.
The Garden was not visited by Alice.
